[\"READY\", \"LOCKED\"],\n  READY: [\"REVEALING\", \"LOCKED\"],\n  REVEALING: [\"ACTIVE\", \"READY\"],\n  ACTIVE: [\"SOLVED\", \"READY\"],\n  SOLVED: [\"COMPLETE\", \"ACTIVE\"],\n  COMPLETE: [\"SOLVED\"],\n};\n\nexport function canTransition(from: ChapterState, to: ChapterState) {\n  return validTransitions[from].includes(to);\n}\n\nexport const gmActionSchema = z.object({\n  action: z.enum([\n    \"PREPARE_CHAPTER\",\n    \"RELEASE_CHAPTER\",\n    \"MARK_SOLVED\",\n    \"AWARD_ARTIFACT\",\n    \"REVEAL_MAP\",\n    \"REVEAL_ROUTE\",\n    \"REVEAL_ARTIFACT_SILHOUETTE\",\n    \"CONNECT_ARTIFACTS\",\n    \"DISCOVER_SIDE_QUEST\",\n    \"UPDATE_SIDE_QUEST\",\n    \"COMPLETE_SIDE_QUEST\",\n    \"ADD_JOURNAL_ANNOTATION\",\n    \"ADD_LOG_ENTRY\",\n    \"TEASE_FINALE\",\n    \"UPDATE_FINALE_REQUIREMENT\",\n    \"UNDO_LAST\",\n    \"PAUSE\",\n    \"RESUME\",\n  ]),\n  campaignSlug: z.string().min(3).max(80),\n  confirmation: z.literal(true),\n  targetKey: z.string().min(1).max(120).optional(),\n  value: z.string().max(1000).optional(),\n});\n\nexport type PublicChapter = {\n  ordinal: number;\n  state: ChapterState;\n  title?: string;\n  narrative?: string;\n  objective?: string;\n  riddle?: string;\n  teaser?: string;\n  hints?: Array<{ ordinal: number; body: string; releasedAt: string; unseen: boolean }>;\n  annotations?: Array<{ key: string; title: string; body: string; createdAt: string; unseen: boolean }>;\n  related?: { mapKey?: string; artifactKey?: string; sideQuestKey?: string };\n  unseen?: boolean;\n};\n\nexport type PublicMapLocation = {\n  key: string;\n  state: string;\n  label: string;\n  name: string;\n  regionLabel?: string;\n  locationType?: string;\n  description?: string;\n  exactness?: string;\n  x?: number;\n  y?: number;\n  mobileX?: number;\n  mobileY?: number;\n  chapterOrdinal?: number;\n  sideQuestKey?: string;\n  unseen: boolean;\n};\n\nexport type PublicArtifact = {\n  key: string;\n  state: string;\n  name?: string;\n  safeName?: string;\n  category?: string;\n  description?: string;\n  discoveryText?: string;\n  silhouetteLabel?: string;\n  displayX: number;\n  displayY: number;\n  assemblyGroup?: string;\n  assemblyPosition?: string;\n  connectedArtifactKey?: string;\n  chapterOrdinal?: number;\n  awardedAt?: string;\n  unseen: boolean;\n};\n\nexport type PublicSideQuest = {\n  key: string;\n  state: string;\n  title?: string;\n  teaser?: string;\n  description?: string;\n  objectives?: Array<{ ordinal: number; body: string; complete: boolean }>;\n  reward?: { type: string; label?: string };\n  completionSummary?: string;\n  chapterOrdinal?: number;\n  mapLocationKey?: string;\n  artifactKey?: string;\n  unseen: boolean;\n};\n\nexport type PublicLogEntry = {\n  key: string;\n  sequence: number;\n  title: string;\n  summary: string;\n  timestamp: string;\n  symbol: string;\n  importance: \"quiet\" | \"notable\" | \"major\";\n  section: \"journal\" | \"chart\" | \"treasures\" | \"quests\" | \"log\" | \"finale\";\n  targetKey?: string;\n  unseen: boolean;\n};\n\nexport type PublicSnapshot = {\n  campaign: { slug: string; title: string; status: string };\n  sequence: number;\n  chapter: PublicChapter;\n  chapters: PublicChapter[];\n  artifacts: PublicArtifact[];\n  mapLocations: PublicMapLocation[];\n  mapRoutes: Array<{\n    key: string;\n    fromKey: string;\n    toKey: string;\n    ordinal: number;\n    state: string;\n    annotation?: string;\n    unseen: boolean;\n  }>;\n  sideQuests: PublicSideQuest[];\n  sideQuest: { title: string; state: string } | null;\n  log: PublicLogEntry[];\n  finale: {\n    state: string;\n    teaser?: string;\n    requirements: Array<{ key: string; label: string; current: number; target: number; optional?: boolean }>;\n    unseen: boolean;\n  };\n  unseen: Record<\"journal\" | \"chart\" | \"treasures\" | \"quests\" | \"log\" | \"finale\", number>;\n};\n\nexport type ClientProgressEvent = {\n  id: string;\n  type: ProgressEventType;\n  sequence: number;\n  payload: Record<string, unknown>;\n  releaseAt: string;\n};\n\nexport function mergeEvents<T extends { id: string; sequence: number }>(existing: T[], incoming: T[]) {\n  const byId = new Map(existing.map((event) => [event.id, event]));\n  for (const event of incoming) byId.set(event.id, event);\n  return [...byId.values()].sort((a, b) => a.sequence - b.sequence);\n}\n\n===== src/domain/visibility.ts =====\r\nimport type { ClientProgressEvent, ProgressEventType } from \"./story\";\n\ntype StoredEvent = {\n  id: string;\n  type: string;\n  sequence: number;\n  payload: string;\n  releaseAt: Date;\n};\n\nconst publicKeys: Partial<Record<ProgressEventType, readonly string[]>> = {\n  CHAPTER_PREPARED: [\"ordinal\"],\n  CHAPTER_RELEASED: [\"ordinal\", \"title\"],\n  CHAPTER_REVEAL_STARTED: [\"ordinal\"],\n  CHAPTER_REVEAL_COMPLETED: [\"ordinal\"],\n  CHAPTER_SOLVED: [\"ordinal\"],\n  HINT_RELEASED: [\"ordinal\", \"hintOrdinal\"],\n  MAP_LOCATION_REVEALED: [\"key\", \"name\", \"regionLabel\", \"x\", \"y\"],\n  MAP_ROUTE_REVEALED: [\"key\", \"fromKey\", \"toKey\"],\n  ARTIFACT_SILHOUETTE_REVEALED: [\"key\", \"safeName\", \"silhouetteLabel\"],\n  ARTIFACT_AWARDED: [\"key\", \"name\", \"description\", \"discoveryText\"],\n  ARTIFACT_CONNECTED: [\"key\", \"connectedArtifactKey\"],\n  SIDE_QUEST_DISCOVERED: [\"key\", \"title\"],\n  SIDE_QUEST_UPDATED: [\"key\", \"objectiveOrdinal\"],\n  SIDE_QUEST_COMPLETED: [\"key\", \"title\", \"rewardLabel\"],\n  JOURNAL_ENTRY_ADDED: [\"key\", \"title\", \"chapterOrdinal\"],\n  JOURNAL_ANNOTATION_ADDED: [\"key\", \"title\", \"chapterOrdinal\"],\n  PLAYER_LOG_ENTRY_ADDED: [\"key\", \"title\"],\n  FINALE_TEASED: [\"state\"],\n  FINALE_REQUIREMENT_UPDATED: [\"key\"],\n  STATE_REVERTED: [\"reversedType\"],\n};\n\nexport function sanitizeEventPayload(type: ProgressEventType, payload: Record<string, unknown>) {\n  const keys = publicKeys[type] ?? [];\n  return Object.fromEntries(keys.filter((key) => payload[key] !== undefined).map((key) => [key, payload[key]]));\n}\n\nexport function toClientEvent(event: StoredEvent): ClientProgressEvent {\n  const type = event.type as ProgressEventType;\n  let payload: Record<string, unknown> = {};\n  try {\n    payload = sanitizeEventPayload(type, JSON.parse(event.payload));\n  } catch {\n    payload = {};\n  }\n  return { id: event.id, type, sequence: event.sequence, payload, releaseAt: event.releaseAt.toISOString() };\n}\n\n===== src/domain/ships-log.ts =====\r\nimport type { PublicLogEntry, ProgressEventType } from \"./story\";\n\ntype LogSource = { id: string; type: string; sequence: number; payload: string; releaseAt: Date };\n\nconst copy: Partial<\n  Record<\n    ProgressEventType,\n    {\n      title: string;\n      summary: string;\n      symbol: string;\n      importance: PublicLogEntry[\"importance\"];\n      section: PublicLogEntry[\"section\"];\n      target?: string;\n    }\n  >\n> = {\n  CAMPAIGN_STARTED: {\n    title: \"The voyage began\",\n    summary: \"The companion was opened for a new passage.\",\n    symbol: \"✦\",\n    importance: \"major\",\n    section: \"journal\",\n  },\n  CAMPAIGN_PAUSED: {\n    title: \"The anchor was lowered\",\n    summary: \"The voyage rests safely until the captain gives word.\",\n    symbol: \"◉\",\n    importance: \"quiet\",\n    section: \"log\",\n  },\n  CAMPAIGN_RESUMED: {\n    title: \"Sails caught the wind\",\n    summary: \"The voyage is underway once more.\",\n    symbol: \"◈\",\n    importance: \"notable\",\n    section: \"journal\",\n  },\n  CHAPTER_RELEASED: {\n    title: \"A journal seal opened\",\n    summary: \"A new chapter has been entrusted to the crew.\",\n    symbol: \"¶\",\n    importance: \"major\",\n    section: \"journal\",\n    target: \"ordinal\",\n  },\n  CHAPTER_SOLVED: {\n    title: \"A mystery yielded\",\n    summary: \"The active chapter has been marked solved.\",\n    symbol: \"✓\",\n    importance: \"major\",\n    section: \"journal\",\n    target: \"ordinal\",\n  },\n  HINT_RELEASED: {\n    title: \"A navigator’s note arrived\",\n    summary: \"A gentle hint was added beside the current clue.\",\n    symbol: \"✎\",\n    importance: \"notable\",\n    section: \"journal\",\n    target: \"ordinal\",\n  },\n  MAP_LOCATION_REVEALED: {\n    title: \"Ink appeared on the chart\",\n    summary: \"A safe destination has emerged from the fog.\",\n    symbol: \"⌖\",\n    importance: \"major\",\n    section: \"chart\",\n    target: \"key\",\n  },\n  MAP_ROUTE_REVEALED: {\n    title: \"A route joined the voyage\",\n    summary: \"Fresh ink now connects two known marks.\",\n    symbol: \"⟶\",\n    importance: \"notable\",\n    section: \"chart\",\n    target: \"key\",\n  },\n  ARTIFACT_SILHOUETTE_REVEALED: {\n    title: \"An empty setting stirred\",\n    summary: \"The altar hints at a relic still beyond reach.\",\n    symbol: \"◇\",\n    importance: \"notable\",\n    section: \"treasures\",\n    target: \"key\",\n  },\n  ARTIFACT_AWARDED: {\n    title: \"A treasure came aboard\",\n    summary: \"A recovered artifact now rests upon the altar.\",\n    symbol: \"◆\",\n    importance: \"major\",\n    section: \"treasures\",\n    target: \"key\",\n  },\n  ARTIFACT_CONNECTED: {\n    title: \"Two relics answered\",\n    summary: \"A safe connection has become visible between artifacts.\",\n    symbol: \"∞\",\n    importance: \"major\",\n    section: \"treasures\",\n    target: \"key\",\n  },\n  SIDE_QUEST_DISCOVERED: {\n    title: \"A rumor found its page\",\n    summary: \"An optional mystery has entered the ledger.\",\n    symbol: \"☾\",\n    importance: \"notable\",\n    section: \"quests\",\n    target: \"key\",\n  },\n  SIDE_QUEST_UPDATED: {\n    title: \"The secret ledger changed\",\n    summary: \"An optional trail has gained a new observation.\",\n    symbol: \"✧\",\n    importance: \"notable\",\n    section: \"quests\",\n    target: \"key\",\n  },\n  SIDE_QUEST_COMPLETED: {\n    title: \"An optional promise was kept\",\n    summary: \"A side mystery has reached its gentle conclusion.\",\n    symbol: \"★\",\n    importance: \"major\",\n    section: \"quests\",\n    target: \"key\",\n  },\n  JOURNAL_ANNOTATION_ADDED: {\n    title: \"Fresh ink in the margin\",\n    summary: \"A player-facing discovery note was added to the journal.\",\n    symbol: \"✎\",\n    importance: \"quiet\",\n    section: \"journal\",\n    target: \"key\",\n  },\n  PLAYER_LOG_ENTRY_ADDED: {\n    title: \"The captain recorded a note\",\n    summary: \"A new player-facing entry joined the voyage record.\",\n    symbol: \"≋\",\n    importance: \"quiet\",\n    section: \"log\",\n    target: \"key\",\n  },\n  FINALE_TEASED: {\n    title: \"The final seal answered\",\n    summary: \"The dormant mechanism shifted, but remains safely sealed.\",\n    symbol: \"✺\",\n    importance: \"major\",\n    section: \"finale\",\n  },\n  FINALE_REQUIREMENT_UPDATED: {\n    title: \"A final socket glimmered\",\n    summary: \"The sealed mechanism acknowledged the voyage’s progress.\",\n    symbol: \"○\",\n    importance: \"notable\",\n    section: \"finale\",\n    target: \"key\",\n  },\n};\n\nexport function eventToLogEntry(event: LogSource, unseen: boolean): PublicLogEntry | null {\n  const template = copy[event.type as ProgressEventType];\n  if (!template) return null;\n  let payload: Record<string, unknown> = {};\n  try {\n    payload = JSON.parse(event.payload);\n  } catch {}\n  const target = template.target ? payload[template.target] : undefined;\n  return {\n    key: event.id,\n    sequence: event.sequence,\n    title: template.title,\n    summary: template.summary,\n    timestamp: event.releaseAt.toISOString(),\n    symbol: template.symbol,\n    importance: template.importance,\n    section: template.section,\n    ...(typeof target === \"string\" || typeof target === \"number\" ? { targetKey: String(target) } : {}),\n    unseen,\n  };\n}\n\n===== src/domain/admin.ts =====\r\nimport { z } from \"zod\";\n\nexport const adminCommands = [\n  \"PREPARE_CHAPTER\",\n  \"RELEASE_CHAPTER\",\n  \"MARK_SOLVED\",\n  \"COMPLETE_CHAPTER\",\n  \"PREPARE_HINT\",\n  \"RELEASE_HINT\",\n  \"RELEASE_NEXT_HINT\",\n  \"REVEAL_MAP\",\n  \"AWARD_ARTIFACT\",\n  \"DISCOVER_SIDE_QUEST\",\n  \"ADVANCE_SIDE_QUEST\",\n  \"RELEASE_JOURNAL_ENTRY\",\n  \"PAUSE\",\n  \"RESUME\",\n  \"UNDO_LAST\",\n  \"REQUEST_RECONCILIATION\",\n] as const;\nexport type AdminCommand = (typeof adminCommands)[number];\n\nexport const actionRisks = {\n  PREPARE_CHAPTER: \"MEDIUM\",\n  RELEASE_CHAPTER: \"HIGH\",\n  MARK_SOLVED: \"HIGH\",\n  COMPLETE_CHAPTER: \"HIGH\",\n  PREPARE_HINT: \"MEDIUM\",\n  RELEASE_HINT: \"HIGH\",\n  RELEASE_NEXT_HINT: \"HIGH\",\n  REVEAL_MAP: \"HIGH\",\n  AWARD_ARTIFACT: \"HIGH\",\n  DISCOVER_SIDE_QUEST: \"HIGH\",\n  ADVANCE_SIDE_QUEST: \"HIGH\",\n  RELEASE_JOURNAL_ENTRY: \"HIGH\",\n  PAUSE: \"HIGH\",\n  RESUME: \"HIGH\",\n  UNDO_LAST: \"HIGH\",\n  REQUEST_RECONCILIATION: \"LOW\",\n} as const satisfies Record<AdminCommand, \"LOW\" | \"MEDIUM\" | \"HIGH\" | \"CRITICAL\">;\n\nexport const gmCapabilities = [\n  \"VIEW_COMMAND_CENTER\",\n  \"VIEW_PLAYER_PREVIEW\",\n  \"PREPARE_PROGRESSION\",\n  \"RELEASE_PROGRESSION\",\n  \"REVERSE_PROGRESSION\",\n  \"USE_EMERGENCY_CONTROLS\",\n  \"RESET_DEVELOPMENT_CAMPAIGN\",\n  \"VIEW_DIAGNOSTICS\",\n  \"VIEW_AUDIT_LOG\",\n] as const;\n\nexport const commandSchema = z.object({\n  command: z.enum(adminCommands),\n  campaignSlug: z.string().min(3).max(80),\n  expectedSequence: z.number().int().nonnegative(),\n  idempotencyKey: z.string().min(12).max(191),\n  targetKey: z.string().min(1).max(191).optional(),\n  payload: z.record(z.string(), z.unknown()).default({}),\n  reason: z.string().trim().max(500).optional(),\n  confirmation: z.literal(true),\n});\n\nexport const previewSchema = commandSchema.omit({ idempotencyKey: true, confirmation: true }).extend({\n  preview: z.literal(true),\n});\n\nexport const stageSchema = commandSchema\n  .pick({ command: true, campaignSlug: true, expectedSequence: true, targetKey: true, payload: true })\n  .extend({ scheduledFor: z.iso.datetime().optional() });\n\nexport type PresenceEvidence = {\n  lastHeartbeatAt: Date;\n  disconnectedAt: Date | null;\n  acknowledgedSequence: number;\n  route: string | null;\n};\n\nexport function describePresence(items: PresenceEvidence[], campaignSequence: number, now = Date.now()) {\n  const active = items.filter((item) => !item.disconnectedAt && now - item.lastHeartbeatAt.getTime() <= 45_000);\n  const recent = items.filter((item) => now - item.lastHeartbeatAt.getTime() <= 120_000);\n  const acknowledgedSequence = Math.max(0, ...items.map((item) => item.acknowledgedSequence));\n  const lag = Math.max(0, campaignSequence - acknowledgedSequence);\n  return {\n    state: active.length ? \"CONNECTED\" : recent.length ? \"RECENTLY_LOST\" : items.length ? \"STALE\" : \"UNKNOWN\",\n    activeDevices: active.length,\n    lastSeenAt: items.length\n      ? new Date(Math.max(...items.map((item) => item.lastHeartbeatAt.getTime()))).toISOString()\n      : null,\n    acknowledgedSequence,\n    synchronized: active.length > 0 && lag === 0,\n    lag,\n    route: active[0]?.route ?? recent[0]?.route ?? null,\n  } as const;\n}\n\nexport function commandCapability(command: AdminCommand) {\n  if (command === \"UNDO_LAST\") return \"REVERSE_PROGRESSION\";\n  if (command === \"REQUEST_RECONCILIATION\") return \"VIEW_DIAGNOSTICS\";\n  if (actionRisks[command] === \"MEDIUM\") return \"PREPARE_PROGRESSION\";\n  return \"RELEASE_PROGRESSION\";\n}\n\n===== src/lib/snapshot.ts =====\r\nimport type { PublicArtifact, PublicChapter, PublicSideQuest, PublicSnapshot } from \"@/domain/story\";\nimport { eventToLogEntry } from \"@/domain/ships-log\";\nimport { db } from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nconst readableChapterStates = new Set([\"REVEALING\", \"ACTIVE\", \"SOLVED\", \"COMPLETE\"]);\nconst detailedQuestStates = new Set([\"DISCOVERED\", \"ACTIVE\", \"PARTIALLY_COMPLETE\", \"COMPLETE\", \"ARCHIVED\"]);\nconst detailedArtifactStates = new Set([\"DISCOVERED\", \"AWARDED\", \"INSPECTED\", \"CONNECTED\", \"ASSEMBLED\"]);\nconst coordinateStates = new Set([\"REVEALED\", \"ACTIVE_DESTINATION\", \"VISITED\", \"COMPLETED\", \"SIDE_QUEST\"]);\n\nfunction requirementList(raw: string): PublicSnapshot[\"finale\"][\"requirements\"] {\n  try {\n    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);\n    return Array.isArray(parsed)\n      ? parsed.filter((item) => item && typeof item.key === \"string\" && typeof item.label === \"string\")\n      : [];\n  } catch {\n    return [];\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function buildPublicSnapshot(campaignId: string, playerAccessId?: string): Promise<PublicSnapshot> {\n  const campaign = await db.campaign.findUniqueOrThrow({\n    where: { id: campaignId },\n    include: {\n      chapters: {\n        orderBy: { ordinal: \"asc\" },\n        include: { content: true, clues: { orderBy: { ordinal: \"asc\" } }, hints: { orderBy: { ordinal: \"asc\" } } },\n      },\n      artifacts: { orderBy: { displayX: \"asc\" }, include: { awards: true } },\n      mapLocations: { orderBy: { key: \"asc\" } },\n      mapRoutes: { orderBy: { ordinal: \"asc\" } },\n      sideQuests: { orderBy: { key: \"asc\" }, include: { objectives: { orderBy: { ordinal: \"asc\" } } } },\n      journalEntries: { where: { releasedAt: { not: null } }, orderBy: { createdAt: \"asc\" } },\n      events: { where: { releaseAt: { lte: new Date() } }, orderBy: { sequence: \"desc\" }, take: 250 },\n    },\n  });\n  const viewed = playerAccessId\n    ? await db.viewedContent.findMany({ where: { playerAccessId }, select: { contentType: true, contentKey: true } })\n    : [];\n  const viewedKeys = new Set(viewed.map((item) => `${item.contentType}:${item.contentKey}`));\n  const isUnseen = (type: string, key: string, released: boolean) => released && !viewedKeys.has(`${type}:${key}`);\n\n  const chapters: PublicChapter[] = campaign.chapters.map((item) => {\n    const readable = readableChapterStates.has(item.state);\n    const chapter: PublicChapter = {\n      ordinal: item.ordinal,\n      state: item.state as PublicChapter[\"state\"],\n      ...(item.safeTeaser ? { teaser: item.safeTeaser } : {}),\n      unseen: isUnseen(\"chapter\", String(item.ordinal), readable),\n    };\n    if (!readable) return chapter;\n    const annotations = campaign.journalEntries\n      .filter((entry) => entry.chapterOrdinal === item.ordinal)\n      .map((entry) => ({\n        key: entry.id,\n        title: entry.title,\n        body: entry.body,\n        createdAt: entry.createdAt.toISOString(),\n        unseen: isUnseen(\"annotation\", entry.id, true),\n      }));\n    return {\n      ...chapter,\n      title: item.content.title,\n      narrative: item.content.narrative,\n      objective: item.content.objective,\n      riddle: item.clues[0]?.body,\n      hints: item.hints\n        .filter((hint) => hint.releasedAt)\n        .map((hint) => ({\n          ordinal: hint.ordinal,\n          body: hint.body,\n          releasedAt: hint.releasedAt!.toISOString(),\n          unseen: isUnseen(\"hint\", hint.id, true),\n        })),\n      annotations,\n      related: {\n        ...(item.relatedMapKey ? { mapKey: item.relatedMapKey } : {}),\n        ...(item.relatedArtifactKey ? { artifactKey: item.relatedArtifactKey } : {}),\n        ...(item.relatedSideQuestKey ? { sideQuestKey: item.relatedSideQuestKey } : {}),\n      },\n    };\n  });\n  const chapter =\n    [...chapters].reverse().find((item) => [\"REVEALING\", \"ACTIVE\", \"SOLVED\"].includes(item.state)) ??\n    chapters.find((item) => item.state !== \"LOCKED\") ??\n    chapters[0];\n\n  const artifacts: PublicArtifact[] = campaign.artifacts.map((item) => {\n    const state = item.awards.length\n      ? item.state === \"UNKNOWN\" || item.state === \"SILHOUETTE\"\n        ? \"AWARDED\"\n        : item.state\n      : item.state;\n    const detailed = detailedArtifactStates.has(state);\n    return {\n      key: item.key,\n      state,\n     …5003 tokens truncated…EAL_ARTIFACT_SILHOUETTE\") {\n        const artifact =\n          campaign.artifacts.find((item) => item.key === options.targetKey) ??\n          campaign.artifacts.find((item) => item.state === \"UNKNOWN\");\n        if (!artifact) throw new Error(\"No unknown artifact remains.\");\n        await tx.artifact.update({ where: { id: artifact.id }, data: { state: \"SILHOUETTE\" } });\n        type = \"ARTIFACT_SILHOUETTE_REVEALED\";\n        payload = { key: artifact.key, safeName: artifact.safeName, silhouetteLabel: artifact.silhouetteLabel };\n      } else if (action === \"CONNECT_ARTIFACTS\") {\n        const artifact =\n          campaign.artifacts.find((item) => item.key === options.targetKey) ??\n          campaign.artifacts.find((item) => item.connectedArtifactKey && item.state !== \"CONNECTED\");\n        if (!artifact?.connectedArtifactKey) throw new Error(\"No safe development artifact connection is configured.\");\n        await tx.artifact.updateMany({\n          where: { campaignId: campaign.id, key: { in: [artifact.key, artifact.connectedArtifactKey] } },\n          data: { state: \"CONNECTED\" },\n        });\n        type = \"ARTIFACT_CONNECTED\";\n        payload = { key: artifact.key, connectedArtifactKey: artifact.connectedArtifactKey };\n      } else if (action === \"DISCOVER_SIDE_QUEST\") {\n        const quest =\n          campaign.sideQuests.find((item) => item.key === options.targetKey) ??\n          campaign.sideQuests.find((item) => [\"HIDDEN\", \"RUMORED\"].includes(item.state));\n        if (!quest) throw new Error(\"No undiscovered side quest remains.\");\n        await tx.sideQuest.update({ where: { id: quest.id }, data: { state: \"DISCOVERED\" } });\n        type = \"SIDE_QUEST_DISCOVERED\";\n        payload = { key: quest.key, title: quest.title };\n      } else if (action === \"UPDATE_SIDE_QUEST\") {\n        const quest =\n          campaign.sideQuests.find((item) => item.key === options.targetKey) ??\n          campaign.sideQuests.find((item) => [\"DISCOVERED\", \"ACTIVE\", \"PARTIALLY_COMPLETE\"].includes(item.state));\n        if (!quest) throw new Error(\"No active side quest can be updated.\");\n        const objective = quest.objectives.find((item) => !item.complete);\n        if (objective) await tx.sideQuestObjective.update({ where: { id: objective.id }, data: { complete: true } });\n        await tx.sideQuest.update({ where: { id: quest.id }, data: { state: \"ACTIVE\" } });\n        type = \"SIDE_QUEST_UPDATED\";\n        payload = { key: quest.key, objectiveOrdinal: objective?.ordinal };\n      } else if (action === \"COMPLETE_SIDE_QUEST\") {\n        const quest =\n          campaign.sideQuests.find((item) => item.key === options.targetKey) ??\n          campaign.sideQuests.find((item) => [\"DISCOVERED\", \"ACTIVE\", \"PARTIALLY_COMPLETE\"].includes(item.state));\n        if (!quest) throw new Error(\"No active side quest can be completed.\");\n        await tx.sideQuestObjective.updateMany({ where: { sideQuestId: quest.id }, data: { complete: true } });\n        await tx.sideQuest.update({ where: { id: quest.id }, data: { state: \"COMPLETE\", completedAt: new Date() } });\n        type = \"SIDE_QUEST_COMPLETED\";\n        payload = { key: quest.key, title: quest.title, rewardLabel: quest.rewardLabel };\n      } else if (action === \"ADD_JOURNAL_ANNOTATION\") {\n        const entry = await tx.journalEntry.create({\n          data: {\n            campaignId: campaign.id,\n            title: \"Development margin note\",\n            body: options.value ?? \"A safe development observation was added beside the active clue.\",\n            kind: \"ANNOTATION\",\n            chapterOrdinal: chapter.ordinal,\n            releasedAt: new Date(),\n          },\n        });\n        type = \"JOURNAL_ANNOTATION_ADDED\";\n        payload = { key: entry.id, title: entry.title, chapterOrdinal: chapter.ordinal };\n      } else if (action === \"ADD_LOG_ENTRY\") {\n        type = \"PLAYER_LOG_ENTRY_ADDED\";\n        payload = { key: `log-${campaign.currentSequence + 1}`, title: options.value ?? \"Development captain’s note\" };\n      } else if (action === \"TEASE_FINALE\") {\n        await tx.campaign.update({\n          where: { id: campaign.id },\n          data: {\n            finaleState: \"TEASED\",\n            finaleTeaser: \"A dormant arrangement of brass rings answers from behind the final seal.\",\n          },\n        });\n        type = \"FINALE_TEASED\";\n        payload = { state: \"TEASED\" };\n      } else if (action === \"UPDATE_FINALE_REQUIREMENT\") {\n        const requirements = JSON.parse(campaign.finaleRequirements) as Array<{\n          key: string;\n          label: string;\n          current: number;\n          target: number;\n          optional?: boolean;\n        }>;\n        const target = requirements.find((item) => item.key === options.targetKey) ?? requirements[0];\n        if (!target) throw new Error(\"No safe finale requirement is configured.\");\n        target.current = Math.min(target.target, target.current + 1);\n        await tx.campaign.update({\n          where: { id: campaign.id },\n          data: { finaleState: \"REQUIREMENTS_PARTIAL\", finaleRequirements: JSON.stringify(requirements) },\n        });\n        type = \"FINALE_REQUIREMENT_UPDATED\";\n        payload = { key: target.key };\n      } else if (action === \"PAUSE\") {\n        if (campaign.status === \"PAUSED\") throw new Error(\"Campaign is already paused.\");\n        await tx.campaign.update({ where: { id: campaign.id }, data: { status: \"PAUSED\" } });\n        type = \"CAMPAIGN_PAUSED\";\n      } else {\n        if (campaign.status === \"ACTIVE\") throw new Error(\"Campaign is already underway.\");\n        await tx.campaign.update({ where: { id: campaign.id }, data: { status: \"ACTIVE\" } });\n        type = \"CAMPAIGN_RESUMED\";\n      }\n    }\n    const event = await appendEvent(tx, campaign.id, type, payload, userId, reversesEventId);\n    await tx.campaignSnapshot.create({\n      data: { campaignId: campaign.id, sequence: event.sequence, state: JSON.stringify({ eventType: type, payload }) },\n    });\n    await tx.adminAuditLog.create({\n      data: {\n        campaignId: campaign.id,\n        userId,\n        action,\n        metadata: JSON.stringify({ eventId: event.id, sequence: event.sequence }),\n      },\n    });\n    return { campaignId: campaign.id, event };\n  });\n  const clientEvent: ClientProgressEvent = toClientEvent(result.event);\n  publishCampaignEvent(result.campaignId, clientEvent);\n  return { event: clientEvent, snapshot: await buildPublicSnapshot(result.campaignId) };\n}\n\n===== src/server/admin-command.ts =====\r\nimport { randomUUID } from \"node:crypto\";\nimport type { AdminCommand } from \"@/domain/admin\";\nimport type { ClientProgressEvent, ProgressEventType, PublicSnapshot } from \"@/domain/story\";\nimport { db } from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { publishCampaignEvent } from \"@/lib/events\";\nimport { buildPublicSnapshot } from \"@/lib/snapshot\";\nimport { executeProgressionAction } from \"@/server/progression\";\n\ntype Input = {\n  command: AdminCommand;\n  campaignSlug: string;\n  expectedSequence: number;\n  idempotencyKey: string;\n  targetKey?: string;\n  payload: Record<string, unknown>;\n  reason?: string;\n};\n\nconst legacyCommands = new Set<AdminCommand>([\n  \"PREPARE_CHAPTER\",\n  \"RELEASE_CHAPTER\",\n  \"MARK_SOLVED\",\n  \"REVEAL_MAP\",\n  \"AWARD_ARTIFACT\",\n  \"PAUSE\",\n  \"RESUME\",\n  \"UNDO_LAST\",\n]);\n\nexport class CommandConflict extends Error {\n  constructor(\n    message: string,\n    public code = \"COMMAND_CONFLICT\",\n  ) {\n    super(message);\n  }\n}\n\nfunction eventFor(command: AdminCommand): ProgressEventType {\n  const events: Partial<Record<AdminCommand, ProgressEventType>> = {\n    COMPLETE_CHAPTER: \"CHAPTER_REVEAL_COMPLETED\",\n    RELEASE_HINT: \"HINT_RELEASED\",\n    RELEASE_NEXT_HINT: \"HINT_RELEASED\",\n    DISCOVER_SIDE_QUEST: \"SIDE_QUEST_DISCOVERED\",\n    ADVANCE_SIDE_QUEST: \"SIDE_QUEST_UPDATED\",\n    RELEASE_JOURNAL_ENTRY: \"NARRATIVE_MESSAGE_RELEASED\",\n    REQUEST_RECONCILIATION: \"PLAYER_RECONCILIATION_REQUESTED\",\n  };\n  const value = events[command];\n  if (!value) throw new CommandConflict(\"That command does not publish directly.\", \"UNSUPPORTED_COMMAND\");\n  return value;\n}\n\nasync function appendCustomEvent(input: Input, userId: string, correlationId: string) {\n  const result = await db.$transaction(async (tx) => {\n    const campaign = await tx.campaign.findUniqueOrThrow({\n      where: { slug: input.campaignSlug },\n      include: {\n        chapters: { orderBy: { ordinal: \"asc\" }, include: { hints: { orderBy: { ordinal: \"asc\" } } } },\n        sideQuests: { include: { objectives: { orderBy: { ordinal: \"asc\" } } } },\n        journalEntries: true,\n      },\n    });\n    if (campaign.currentSequence !== input.expectedSequence)\n      throw new CommandConflict(\n        `State changed from sequence ${input.expectedSequence} to ${campaign.currentSequence}. Refresh and review the action again.`,\n        \"STALE_SEQUENCE\",\n      );\n    if (campaign.status === \"PAUSED\" && input.command !== \"REQUEST_RECONCILIATION\")\n      throw new CommandConflict(\"The campaign is paused. Resume it before releasing progression.\", \"CAMPAIGN_PAUSED\");\n\n    let payload: Record<string, unknown> = {};\n    if (input.command === \"COMPLETE_CHAPTER\") {\n      const chapter = campaign.chapters.find((item) => item.state === \"SOLVED\");\n      if (!chapter) throw new CommandConflict(\"Only a solved chapter can be completed.\", \"INVALID_TRANSITION\");\n      await tx.chapter.update({ where: { id: chapter.id }, data: { state: \"COMPLETE\" } });\n      payload = { ordinal: chapter.ordinal };\n    } else if (input.command === \"RELEASE_HINT\" || input.command === \"RELEASE_NEXT_HINT\") {\n      const chapter = campaign.chapters.find((item) => [\"ACTIVE\", \"SOLVED\"].includes(item.state));\n      if (!chapter) throw new CommandConflict(\"Release the chapter before releasing a hint.\", \"PREREQUISITE_FAILED\");\n      const hint = input.targetKey\n        ? chapter.hints.find((item) => item.id === input.targetKey || String(item.ordinal) === input.targetKey)\n        : chapter.hints.find((item) => !item.releasedAt);\n      if (!hint) throw new CommandConflict(\"No unreleased hint is available.\", \"ALREADY_RELEASED\");\n      const priorUnreleased = chapter.hints.some((item) => item.ordinal < hint.ordinal && !item.releasedAt);\n      if (priorUnreleased) throw new CommandConflict(\"Release earlier hints first.\", \"HINT_ORDER\");\n      await tx.hint.update({ where: { id: hint.id }, data: { releasedAt: new Date() } });\n      payload = { chapterOrdinal: chapter.ordinal, hintOrdinal: hint.ordinal, body: hint.body };\n    } else if (input.command === \"DISCOVER_SIDE_QUEST\" || input.command === \"ADVANCE_SIDE_QUEST\") {\n      const quest = campaign.sideQuests.find((item) => !input.targetKey || item.key === input.targetKey);\n      if (!quest) throw new CommandConflict(\"The side quest is not configured.\", \"NOT_FOUND\");\n      const next =\n        input.command === \"DISCOVER_SIDE_QUEST\" ? \"DISCOVERED\" : quest.state === \"DISCOVERED\" ? \"ACTIVE\" : \"COMPLETE\";\n      if (input.command === \"DISCOVER_SIDE_QUEST\" && quest.state !== \"UNDISCOVERED\")\n        throw new CommandConflict(\"The side quest is already discovered.\", \"ALREADY_RELEASED\");\n      await tx.sideQuest.update({ where: { id: quest.id }, data: { state: next } });\n      payload = { key: quest.key, title: quest.title, state: next };\n    } else if (input.command === \"RELEASE_JOURNAL_ENTRY\") {\n      const title = String(input.payload.title ?? \"Captain's dispatch\").trim();\n      const body = String(input.payload.body ?? \"\").trim();\n      if (!body) throw new CommandConflict(\"Write the dispatch before releasing it.\", \"VALIDATION_FAILED\");\n      const entry = await tx.journalEntry.create({\n        data: { campaignId: campaign.id, title, body, releasedAt: new Date() },\n      });\n      payload = { id: entry.id, title, body };\n    } else {\n      payload = { requestedAtSequence: campaign.currentSequence };\n    }\n\n    const updated = await tx.campaign.update({\n      where: { id: campaign.id },\n      data: { currentSequence: { increment: 1 } },\n    });\n    const type = eventFor(input.command);\n    const event = await tx.progressEvent.create({\n      data: {\n        campaignId: campaign.id,\n        type,\n        payload: JSON.stringify(payload),\n        actor: userId,\n        sequence: updated.currentSequence,\n      },\n    });\n    await tx.campaignSnapshot.create({\n      data: { campaignId: campaign.id, sequence: event.sequence, state: JSON.stringify({ eventType: type, payload }) },\n    });\n    await tx.adminAuditLog.create({\n      data: {\n        campaignId: campaign.id,\n        userId,\n        action: input.command,\n        correlationId,\n        reason: input.reason,\n        metadata: JSON.stringify({ eventId: event.id, sequence: event.sequence, targetKey: input.targetKey }),\n      },\n    });\n    return { campaignId: campaign.id, event };\n  });\n  const event: ClientProgressEvent = {\n    id: result.event.id,\n    type: result.event.type as ProgressEventType,\n    sequence: result.event.sequence,\n    payload: JSON.parse(result.event.payload) as Record<string, unknown>,\n    releaseAt: result.event.releaseAt.toISOString(),\n  };\n  publishCampaignEvent(result.campaignId, event);\n  return { event, snapshot: await buildPublicSnapshot(result.campaignId) };\n}\n\nexport async function executeAdminCommand(input: Input, userId: string) {\n  const campaign = await db.campaign.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { slug: input.campaignSlug } });\n  const existing = await db.commandExecution.findUnique({\n    where: { campaignId_idempotencyKey: { campaignId: campaign.id, idempotencyKey: input.idempotencyKey } },\n  });\n  if (existing?.status === \"SUCCEEDED\" && existing.result)\n    return { ...(JSON.parse(existing.result) as object), idempotentReplay: true };\n  if (existing) throw new CommandConflict(\"This command is already being processed.\", \"DUPLICATE_COMMAND\");\n  if (campaign.currentSequence !== input.expectedSequence)\n    throw new CommandConflict(\n      `State changed from sequence ${input.expectedSequence} to ${campaign.currentSequence}. Refresh before confirming.`,\n      \"STALE_SEQUENCE\",\n    );\n\n  const correlationId = randomUUID();\n  const execution = await db.commandExecution.create({\n    data: {\n      campaignId: campaign.id,\n      idempotencyKey: input.idempotencyKey,\n      command: input.command,\n      expectedSequence: input.expectedSequence,\n      correlationId,\n      status: \"RUNNING\",\n    },\n  });\n  try {\n    let result: { event: ClientProgressEvent; snapshot: PublicSnapshot };\n    if (legacyCommands.has(input.command)) {\n      const current = await db.campaign.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { id: campaign.id } });\n      if (current.currentSequence !== input.expectedSequence)\n        throw new CommandConflict(\"Another command won the race. Refresh before retrying.\", \"STALE_SEQUENCE\");\n      result = await executeProgressionAction(\n        input.campaignSlug,\n        input.command as Parameters<typeof executeProgressionAction>[1],\n        userId,\n      );\n    } else if (input.command === \"PREPARE_HINT\") {\n      const staged = await stageAdminCommand(input, userId);\n      const snapshot = await buildPublicSnapshot(campaign.id);\n      result = {\n        event: {\n          id: staged.id,\n          type: \"HINT_PREPARED\",\n          sequence: campaign.currentSequence,\n          payload: { staged: true, targetKey: input.targetKey },\n          releaseAt: staged.preparedAt.toISOString(),\n        },\n        snapshot,\n      };\n    } else result = await appendCustomEvent(input, userId, correlationId);\n    const stored = { ...result, correlationId, persistence: \"COMMITTED\", delivery: \"PUBLISHED\" };\n    await db.commandExecution.update({\n      where: { id: execution.id },\n      data: { status: \"SUCCEEDED\", result: JSON.stringify(stored), completedAt: new Date() },\n    });\n    return stored;\n  } catch (error) {\n    await db.commandExecution.update({\n      where: { id: execution.id },\n      data: {\n        status: \"FAILED\",\n        result: JSON.stringify({ error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"Unknown failure\" }),\n        completedAt: new Date(),\n      },\n    });\n    await db.adminAuditLog.create({\n      data: {\n        campaignId: campaign.id,\n        userId,\n        action: input.command,\n        correlationId,\n        outcome: \"FAILED\",\n        reason: input.reason,\n        metadata: JSON.stringify({ code: error instanceof CommandConflict ? error.code : \"COMMAND_FAILED\" }),\n      },\n    });\n    throw error;\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function stageAdminCommand(\n  input: Pick<Input, \"command\" | \"campaignSlug\" | \"expectedSequence\" | \"targetKey\" | \"payload\"> & {\n    scheduledFor?: string;\n  },\n  userId: string,\n) {\n  const campaign = await db.campaign.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { slug: input.campaignSlug } });\n  if (campaign.currentSequence !== input.expectedSequence)\n    throw new CommandConflict(\"The proposed action is stale. Refresh it before staging.\", \"STALE_SEQUENCE\");\n  return db.preparedAction.create({\n    data: {\n      campaignId: campaign.id,\n      command: input.command,\n      targetKey: input.targetKey,\n      payload: JSON.stringify(input.payload),\n      expectedSequence: input.expectedSequence,\n      scheduledFor: input.scheduledFor ? new Date(input.scheduledFor) : undefined,\n      preparedBy: userId,\n      status: input.scheduledFor ? \"SCHEDULED\" : \"PREPARED\",\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function previewAdminCommand(input: Omit<Input, \"idempotencyKey\">) {\n  const campaign = await db.campaign.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { slug: input.campaignSlug } });\n  const snapshot = await buildPublicSnapshot(campaign.id);\n  const projected = structuredClone(snapshot);\n  const prerequisites: string[] = [];\n  if (campaign.currentSequence !== input.expectedSequence) prerequisites.push(\"The dashboard state is stale.\");\n  if (campaign.status === \"PAUSED\" && ![\"RESUME\", \"REQUEST_RECONCILIATION\"].includes(input.command))\n    prerequisites.push(\"Resume the campaign first.\");\n  if (input.command === \"RELEASE_CHAPTER\" && snapshot.chapter.state !== \"READY\")\n    prerequisites.push(\"Prepare this chapter first.\");\n  if (input.command === \"RELEASE_CHAPTER\" && !prerequisites.length) projected.chapter.state = \"ACTIVE\";\n  if (input.command === \"MARK_SOLVED\" && snapshot.chapter.state !== \"ACTIVE\")\n    prerequisites.push(\"Only the active chapter can be solved.\");\n  if (input.command === \"PAUSE\") projected.campaign.status = \"PAUSED\";\n  if (input.command === \"RESUME\") projected.campaign.status = \"ACTIVE\";\n  return {\n    preview: true,\n    watermark: \"PREVIEW — NOT RELEASED\",\n    currentSequence: campaign.currentSequence,\n    projectedSequence: campaign.currentSequence + (input.command === \"PREPARE_HINT\" ? 0 : 1),\n    eventType: input.command === \"PREPARE_HINT\" ? \"HINT_PREPARED\" : eventForPreview(input.command),\n    affectedSystems: affectedSystems(input.command),\n    undoAvailable: ![\"REQUEST_RECONCILIATION\", \"PREPARE_HINT\"].includes(input.command),\n    prerequisites,\n    canExecute: prerequisites.length === 0,\n    snapshot: projected,\n  };\n}\n\nfunction eventForPreview(command: AdminCommand) {\n  const known: Partial<Record<AdminCommand, string>> = {\n    PREPARE_CHAPTER: \"CHAPTER_PREPARED\",\n    RELEASE_CHAPTER: \"CHAPTER_RELEASED\",\n    MARK_SOLVED: \"CHAPTER_SOLVED\",\n    REVEAL_MAP: \"MAP_LOCATION_REVEALED\",\n    AWARD_ARTIFACT: \"ARTIFACT_AWARDED\",\n    PAUSE: \"CAMPAIGN_PAUSED\",\n    RESUME: \"CAMPAIGN_RESUMED\",\n    UNDO_LAST: \"STATE_REVERTED\",\n  };\n  return known[command] ?? eventFor(command);\n}\n\nfunction affectedSystems(command: AdminCommand) {\n  const systems: Partial<Record<AdminCommand, string[]>> = {\n    RELEASE_CHAPTER: [\"Chapter\", \"Objective\", \"Voyage chart\", \"Ship's Log\", \"Player ceremony\"],\n    RELEASE_HINT: [\"Hint ledger\", \"Player snapshot\", \"Ship's Log\"],\n    RELEASE_NEXT_HINT: [\"Hint ledger\", \"Player snapshot\", \"Ship's Log\"],\n    AWARD_ARTIFACT: [\"Relic frame\", \"Ship's Log\", \"Player ceremony\"],\n    REVEAL_MAP: [\"Voyage chart\", \"Ship's Log\", \"Player ceremony\"],\n    UNDO_LAST: [\"Campaign snapshot\", \"Player reconciliation\", \"Audit history\"],\n  };\n  return systems[command] ?? [\"Campaign state\", \"Ship's Log\"];\n}\n", "type": "input_text"}]

decoder = new TextDecoder();\n      let output = \"\";\n      while (!output.includes(\"event: heartbeat\")) output += decoder.decode((await reader.read()).value);\n      return name\").fill(process.env.GM_USERNAME!);\n  await page.getByLabel(\"Passphrase\").fill(process.env.GM_PASSWORD!);\n  await page.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Enter the chart room\" }).click();\n  await expect(page.getByRole(\"heading\", { name: \"The Forever Treasure\" })).toBeVisible();\n\n  const before = await (await page.request.get(\"/api/gm/status\")).json();\n  const preview = await page.request.post(\"/api/gm/preview\", {\n    data: {\n      command: \"REQUEST_RECONCILIATION\",\n      campaignSlug: before.campaign.slug,\n      expectedSequence: before.campaign.sequence,\n      payload: {},\n      preview: true,\n    },\n  });\n  expect(preview.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n  expect((await preview.json()).watermark).toBe(\"PREVIEW — NOT RELEASED\");\n  const afterPreview = await (await page.request.get(\"/api/gm/status\")).json();\n  expect(afterPreview.campaign.sequence).toBe(before.campaign.sequence);\n\n  const stale = await page.request.post(\"/api/gm/commands\", {\n    headers: { \"x-csrf-token\": before.csrfToken },\n    data: {\n      command: \"REQUEST_RECONCILIATION\",\n      campaignSlug: before.campaign.slug,\n      expectedSequence: before.campaign.sequence + 1,\n      idempotencyKey: crypto.randomUUID(),\n      payload: {},\n      confirmation: true,\n    },\n  });\n  expect(stale.status()).toBe(409);\n  expect((await stale.json()).code).toBe(\"STALE_SEQUENCE\");\n\n  const key = crypto.randomUUID();\n  const request = {\n    command: \"REQUEST_RECONCILIATION\",\n    campaignSlug: before.campaign.slug,\n    expectedSequence: before.campaign.sequence,\n    idempotencyKey: key,\n    payload: {},\n    confirmation: true,\n  };\n  const first = await page.request.post(\"/api/gm/commands\", {\n    headers: { \"x-csrf-token\": before.csrfToken },\n    data: request,\n  });\n  expect(first.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n  const replay = await page.request.post(\"/api/gm/commands\", {\n    headers: { \"x-csrf-token\": before.csrfToken },\n    data: request,\n  });\n  expect(replay.ok()).toBeTruthy();\n  expect((await replay.json()).idempotentReplay).toBe(true);\n});\n\ntest(\"workspace routes remain authenticated, expect(page.getByText(\"PLAYER VIEW — ACTUAL RELEASED STATE\")).toBeVisible();\n  const results = await new AxeBuilder({ page }).analyze();\n  expect(results.violations.filter((item) => [\"serious\", })).toBeVisible();\n  await capture(page, `${browserName}-emergency-430x932`);\n  for (const [width, height, name] of [\n    [2560, 1440, \"deck-2560x1440\"],\n    [1920, 1080, \"deck-1920x1080\"],\n
